text:
All clean. Here's what was wrong:

**Root cause:** `createClient` was called with no `chains` array, so the SDK had an empty chain registry. When `executeQuote` tried to look up chain 8453 (Base) to build the transaction, it couldn't find it → "Failed to find chain id".

**Two-layer fix:**
1. **`AuthProvider`** — `createClient` now bootstraps with our wagmi `supportedChains` converted via `convertViemChainToRelayChain`, so the SDK has chains immediately on load
2. **`RelaySwap`** — once `useRelayChains` returns the full Relay chain list (all chains Relay supports, not just our wagmi subset), the client is re-initialized with the complete set — this ensures any chain the user picks in the UI is registered with the SDK
